description_long: This guard rail consists of two sturdy vertical posts supporting three evenly spaced horizontal rails, all constructed from what appears to be a solid, matte-finished material. The posts are slightly thicker than the rails, providing structural stability and a robust appearance. The rails are straight and rectangular in profile, running parallel to each other and securely joined to the posts at each end. The ends of the posts are blunt and squared off, with no visible flaring or additional end treatments. The entire structure is a uniform medium brown color, suggesting a painted or powder-coated finish, likely for weather resistance. There are no visible reflective markings, decorative elements, or interactive components, giving the guard rail a utilitarian and functional look suitable for urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or parking lots.
description: A sturdy, medium brown guard rail with two thick vertical posts and three horizontal rails, all with a matte finish and blunt ends. The design is simple, functional, and well-suited for urban safety barriers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the guard rail, with all three horizontal rails and both vertical posts clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the guard rail, with the posts and rails appearing as narrow lines.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the three horizontal rails and two posts from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile of the structure with minimal visible detail.
